results.name: rescue-land
results.description: Bounce a land you control back to your hand.

results.name: restock
results.description: Effects that return cards from the graveyard to the library. (Named in Maro's color pie 2017 article.)

results.name: restock-all
results.description: Cards that put your entire graveyard into your library

results.name: restock-any
results.description: Return any cards to your library from the graveyard, not caring about their types.

results.name: restock-self
results.description: Cards that restock themselves.

results.name: restores old rule
results.description: Cards that have an effect that effectively brings back a rule that was changed or removed

results.name: restricted attacker
results.description: Cards that can only attack in specific circumstances.

results.name: restricted blocker
results.description: Cards that can block, but only in specific circumstances.

results.name: restricted mana
results.description: Mana that has restrictions on what you can or cannot use it on.

results.name: retaliate to damage
results.description: Effects that retaliate to damage inflicted upon you, by benefitting you or punishing the opponent.

results.name: returned
results.description: The Returned of Theros, those who have come back from the underworld.

results.name: reveal hand
results.description: Makes players reveal their hands more permanently than [peek](peek-hand)

results.name: revised artwork
results.description: Artwork that has had some section of it repainted/altered compared to a previous printed version of that same artwork. This tag is not for alternate or replacement artwork.

results.name: revolt
results.description: Effects that care if a permanent (or creature, etc) you controlled left the battlefield this turn.

results.name: rhox
results.description: Rhino-like humanoids found around the multiverse.

results.name: rhyming name
results.description: Cards whose names contain a rhyme, or come very close to it.

results.name: rhystic
results.description: Effects that opponents can buy off if they pay mana.

results.name: richard garfield
results.description: Dude who created the game.

results.name: rigging
results.description: Ropes used to support the masts and sails of a boat.

results.name: right-facing
results.description: Depicts a creature that is illustrated facing right (from our perspective)
